description: CompositionRed and white gingham shirt made of 100% cotton, with half sleeves that have a contrast border, full lenght  buttoned placket, pocket on left chest and a curved hemlineFittingRelaxedWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This red and white gingham shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The red and white combo gives off an energetic vibe.
